title: SPINE Implementation Plan: Structured Data Handoffs, State Invariants, Prompt Optimization & Fail-Closed Gates
M1 Foundation: Add Pydantic models, exception, state fields, and config
M2 State Invariants and Compose Updates
description: Update all 8 result mappers to set completion flags in compose.py. Add validate_phase_prerequisites() function to artifact_gate.py. Update _save_exploration_artifacts to set exploration invariants. Enable response_format=SliceResult and VerificationResult for subagents. Add _collect_slice_results and verification_findings to subgraph_state.py.

title: M3.5 GAP_PLAN Structured Output: Create gap_plan_tools.py and model
M3.6 CRITIC Structured Output: Add CriticReview model
M4 Prompt Optimization: SPECIFY and PLAN agents
M4 Prompt Optimization: IMPLEMENT agent
M4 Prompt Optimization: VERIFY agent
M5 Fail-Closed Gates: Phase prerequisite checks
M6 Constrained Decoding: Wire guided_json support
M7 Integration Testing: End-to-end verification
Structured I/O Expansion: IMPLEMENT & VERIFY Phases
description: Expand the manager/router/call pattern to IMPLEMENT and VERIFY phases, replacing all agent-driven markdown-parsing with structured JSON I/O

title: Add implementation.json write side to WriteImplementationReportTool
description: Add JSON serialization to WriteImplementationReportTool._run (plan lines 120-148). After writing implementation.md, also write implementation.json with summary and slice_results. Update return message to include JSON file info (plan line 146).

title: Remove legacy pathway and make execution_waves a Fail-Closed invariant
description: Eliminate the legacy slice-*.md fallback. Extend _check_plan_prerequisite in artifact_gate.py (line 578-600) to also check execution_waves. Remove legacy else branch, has_waves checks, and all legacy prompt builders from implement_agent.py. Simplify implement_subgraph.py subgraph prompt to always be wave-based. Add execution_waves_present: bool to WorkflowState. Remove dead list_slice_files import.

title: Refactor read_verify_context to use structured JSON instead of markdown
description: Replace slice-*.md glob loop with plan.json + implementation.json reads. Rewrite ReadVerifyContextTool._run to load plan.json for feature_slices and implementation.json for results. Update verify_agent.py orchestrator prompt to reference structured data. Remove tasks_dir from factory and ReadSliceFilesVerifyTool references.

title: Fix stale subgraph prompts and use verification.json for status
description: Fix implement_subgraph.py prompt: remove references to specification.md, plan.md, tasks.md, codebase-map.md, replace with read_slice_files tool guidance. Fix verify_subgraph.py prompt: remove references to markdown files and read_file/grep, replace with read_verify_context tool guidance. Update _save_verify_artifacts to read verification.json for authoritative status instead of string-matching verification.md.

title: Add verification.json write side to WriteVerificationReportTool
description: Add JSON serialization to WriteVerificationReportTool._run. After writing verification.md, also write verification.json with summary, overall_status, and verification_results. Update return message.

title: Clean up dead code from refactor
description: Remove ReadSliceFilesVerifyTool and ReadSliceFilesVerifyInput from verify_tools.py. Remove _build_legacy_orchestrator_prompt from implement_agent.py. Remove unused list_slice_files imports.

title: Add unit tests for new JSON output and structured reads
description: Add test_write_implementation_report_writes_json. Create test_verify_tools.py with tests for verification.json write and read_verify_context reads plan.json.

title: Integration test: full workflow with structured I/O
description: Create integration test for complete SPECIFY -> PLAN -> IMPLEMENT -> VERIFY workflow with JSON artifacts.

title: Agentic Garbage Collection — Context Window Eviction
description: Fix the 260K-token context-window crash during codebase exploration by giving the agent a commit_findings_and_clear_search tool that saves critical findings to a persistent scratchpad and triggers LangGraph-level message eviction via RemoveMessage.

title: Wire eviction_check node into exploration_subgraph.py
Add scratchpad to exploration state mappers in compose.py
Create unit tests for garbage collector (5 tests)
Create garbage_collector.py with tool + eviction logic
Add scratchpad field to ExplorationSubgraphState
Add Amnesia Warning to researcher subagent prompt
Inject GC tool and scratchpad into exploration_agents.py
